# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:dp_restore_union = {
	war_goal = restore_union

	texture = "gfx/interface/icons/war_goals/enforce_treaty_article.dds"

	selectable_in_lens = {
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		has_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
	}

	possible = {
		aggressive_diplomatic_plays_permitted = yes
	}

	ai_acceptance_max = 90

	on_weekly_pulse = {}

	on_war_begins = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_scope_play_involved = {
					has_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
				}
			}
			random_scope_play_involved = { # This is typically a temp variable. Starting this war makes it permanent for the duration of the war.
				limit = {
					has_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
				}
				remove_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
				set_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
			}
		}
	}

	on_war_end = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_scope_play_involved = {
					has_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
				}
			}
			random_scope_play_involved = { # Removes variable upon war conclusion, regardless of outcome
				limit = {
					has_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
				}
				remove_variable = por_seeking_restore_union_var
			}
		}
	}
}
